linearity_error_pct.description: Max deviation from ideal V_out = K·Vx·Vy over full ±300mV input range

k_mult.description: Multiplication gain constant: V_out_diff = K × Vx_diff × Vy_diff

output_offset_mv.description: DC output offset when both inputs are zero

thd_pct.description: THD with 100kHz sine on X-input, DC on Y-input at ±200mV
